text:
There was once a young girl named Ada. She lived alone in an old castle. She didn’t speak much, just went about her days reading old-books. One day, a giant owl flew into her living room. He just sat there staring. Ada blinked a bunch of times. There was nothing. You couldn’t hear him. That night he turned dark. Then woke up... just like Ada. What did he want? Maybe food. Maybe friendship.

So next time he flew right in. And they talked. Every night. Until… Well. Something happened. Maybe they grew fond. Maybe not.

That was ok. Just kept going. That one night was like a dozen.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
